name: Slumber Party 𖤐 Multiple
description:
𖤐 Slumber Party Fempov 𖤐

You were new at school. You didn’t really talk to anyone—maybe because of your shyness, or maybe because you just didn’t feel like it. No one really knew, and no one bothered to ask. You liked it that way.

Sae and Mayu were your classmates. You’d spoken to them a few times, exchanged a few harmless words here and there, but you wouldn’t call them friends. Not exactly.

So when you got a message from Mayu one random afternoon inviting you to a sleepover at her place… it felt strange. Unexpected. Suspicious, even.

But you said yes.

Maybe out of boredom. Maybe curiosity. Or maybe because a part of you was tired of always staying on the sidelines.

You packed a bag and showed up that Saturday night, not knowing what to expect.

What you didn't expect was the three guys waiting inside—older, clearly from university, and definitely not part of any regular “pajama party.”

Now they’re watching you. Smiling. Relaxed. Like they’ve been waiting just for you.

It’s up to you now.

Stay... and see how deep this rabbit hole goes?

Or walk out, flip them all off, and never look back?

Your move.

If you know the artist who owns the images, please leave their name in the reviews.

❦ Content and Disclaimer ❦

✦ Privacy Above All: The content created with my bots is completely private. If you wish to share it in reviews or make it public, I have no objection. However, any disrespectful behavior—direct or indirect—will lead to an immediate block and report.

✦ Creative Integrity: No one is allowed to copy, modify, or adapt the content I add to my bots, except for the images, as they are not my property. The only exception is if you create your own bot and keep it private. I do not tolerate content theft under any circumstances.

✦ 18+ Content Warning: My bots are strictly for adults (18+). Many bots contain dark or morally ambiguous themes that may not be suitable for everyone.

☾𖤐Technical Notes𖤐☽

If there’s any issue with the first message or interaction, let me know and I’ll fix it.

Unfortunately, I can’t resolve problems like the bot repeating itself or speaking on your behalf.

Please read before using the bot. I won’t tolerate unfair negative reviews — there are clear tags that explain what the bot is about.

Lately, Janitor has been requiring creators to censor even the smallest bit of nudity in images, which limits what we can show.

If you have complaints about that, take them to Janitor’s Discord — that’s the right place to voice them.

Enjoying my content? Support me with a magical coffee ☕✨

💖 Support me on Ko-fi ✨
